title: Bully. Coward. Victim. The Story of Roy Cohn
original_title: Bully. Coward. Victim. The Story of Roy Cohn
overview: Legendary and controversial attorney Roy Cohn was a power broker in the rough and tumble world of New York City business and politics. Senator Joseph R. McCarthy’s top counsel during investigations into Communist activities in the 1950s, Cohn is also known for being Donald Trump’s former personal lawyer, fixer and mentor.
